characters.description: An Archon moving toward fusion who develops her soul, gravity magic, and combat equipment under Jevin's guidance. After recognizing the reach of his authority over Makinaven, she agrees to keep that discovery confidential.
characters.name: Tala

characters.description: Tala's Archon adviser, who encourages powerful mages to contribute to humanity. His aura and magical signature appear to extend throughout Makinaven. He agrees to prepare anchor-linked darts for Tala and tells her to keep her inference about his influence private.
characters.name: Jevin

characters.description: Tala's recurring sparring partner and a skilled combatant. His progress toward fusion depends on restructuring an existing soul bond so it does not lead to confusion.
characters.name: Grediv

characters.description: Tala's soul-bound weapon and a central part of her combat style. Its unusually deep bond with her gives it considerable magical force during training, although a more skilled sparring partner can still overcome that advantage.
characters.name: Flow

characters.description: An inscribed student whose mage training is incomplete. He has a partial keystone, highly developed illusion magic, and an Archon guardian sworn to his deceased parents who serves as his instructor and chaperone.
characters.name: Reeve

characters.description: Tala's powerful creature companion and mount. He accompanies her when she leaves Makinaven with the Caravan Guild, stays near her during the journey, and is capable of moving through dimensional space.
characters.name: Terry

characters.description: A Harvester Guild Archon traveling west who temporarily joins the caravan. He specializes in controlling kinetic energy through a soul-bound cord woven with muscle fibers.
characters.name: Harvester Guild Archon

characters.description: The caravan's lead defensive mage and an experienced protector. He kills a chitin-armored predator threatening the caravan, then assigns the valuable remains to the guards who assisted him.
characters.name: Senior caravan mage protector

characters.description: A caravan mage specializing in dimensional magic. She advises Tala to separate the interwoven currents in a combined blood Archon Star by redirecting their circulation instead of trying to take direct control.
characters.name: Caravan dimensional mage

characters.description: A non-mage Culinary Guild member who works aboard the caravan's chuckwagon. The cook gives Tala a token that lets her notice the wagon's concealed guide inscriptions and grants her limited knowledge of the Guild's hidden practices.
characters.name: Culinary Guild cook

characters.description: A powerful independent researcher whose managed forest provides the caravan temporary shelter. She studies fungi and magical materials, and immediately notices an unusual partial synchronization between Tala and the senior caravan mage.
characters.name: Fungus Archon

characters.description: A caravan guard standing watch during a dangerous forest passage. He responds promptly to Tala's warning by waking the camp as an approaching Leshkin force turns a night encounter into an emergency retreat.
characters.name: Carl

characters.description: A fellow Archon and capable combat mage who takes part in the caravan's emergency breakout and recovers Leshkin equipment.
characters.name: Combat mage

characters.description: Tala's friend and trade contact in Bandfast. Hurt by Tala's unannounced absence, she accepts an apology and renews their friendship. She then identifies several trade opportunities and agrees to arrange the sale of Tala's thundercattle horns.
characters.name: Lynn

characters.description: Tala's soul-bound dimensional storage. She uses it to carry inert specimens collected from crystallized wildlife encountered while returning to the caravan.
characters.name: Kit

characters.description: An air-specialist Archon nearing fusion and the senior caravan mage's great-granddaughter. She uses paired inscribed bar maces and joins Tala's developing program of martial practice with the Bandfast guards.
characters.name: Aproa

characters.description: A skilled Bandfast guard and valued training opponent. He is introduced as a prospective opponent for Aproa when Tala brings the air-specialist Archon to the guard yard for broader martial practice.
characters.name: Adam

characters.description: Tala's inscriber and adviser on safeguards against mental interference. She detects a weak lingering influence and evidence of two erased short-term memories, then proposes protected mind maps linked to an archive bond.
characters.name: Holly

characters.description: A Constructionist Guild master who helps Tala plan a complex soul bond combining garments with Leshkin armor. The master organizes eight material channels so the finished garment can retain useful properties and change shape.
characters.name: Constructionist master

characters.description: A local mage hunter equipped with an iron tube and separately paired, gold-inscribed components. She is introduced among the Archons training with Tala and has specialized tools for confronting mages.
characters.name: Jean

characters.description: A local mage hunter specializing in magnetic control. He brings iron dust into combat, can use magic despite the metal's normal interference, and prepares to disable opponents with varied magical specialties.
characters.name: Magnetic-field mage hunter

characters.description: An air manipulator in the Bandfast training group who uses the atmosphere as both a weapon and a defense. He demonstrates an indirect approach to magical combat by defeating a lightning mage through removal of the surrounding oxygen.
characters.name: Stan

characters.description: An archivist who can query the archive under Tala's permissions and modify the access granted to her. She helps establish what Tala may research about arcanist harvests and their temporary effects on ordinary biological processes.
characters.name: Ingrid

characters.description: A Constructionist Guild specialist trusted with a valuable and unusual alteration. He integrates a revered siphon fascia into Kit, performing the complex merge while Tala supplies the power needed to complete the process.
characters.name: Constructionist Archon

characters.description: A material guide at the Constructionist Guild. When Tala is charged an excessive fee for occupying a merge room, he reduces the bill to the ordinary reservation rate and directs her toward a guild project overseer.
characters.name: Simon

characters.description: A Constructionist Guild project overseer who sees commercial potential in Tala's comb. He agrees to explore producing a version that mundane users can operate and begins negotiating a partnership with her.
characters.name: Constructionist Guild Archon
